text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Challenging the Takarazuka Kinen<n>with a new
perspective,<n>Matikanefukukitaru makes a
miraculous comeback.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Eager to sweep through the rest of<n>summer, she
has a completely new<n>outlook on running.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, she decides to let fortune<n>slips
choose her next race, as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But this time she won't be relying on<n>luck—she
wants to prove that she can<n>take on whatever
challenge fate has<n>in store.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Hakodate<n>Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles<n>toward the land of the
million-dollar<n>night view!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Kokura Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles toward a<n>blazing battle
in Kyushu, the land of<n>the fire gods!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Sapporo<n>Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru aims for<n>victory in the
midsummer heat,<n>determined to create a festival
of luck<n>to rival the winter Snow Festival.
